results.title: Trump gives update on condition of US woman released by Iran after massive heart attack
results.description: Dena Karari, a US woman held in Iran since 2024, has been released, Donald Trump announced as he thanked Tehran for the 'gesture of Goodwill'

results.title: The book born from bad news: Shrewsbury author turns prostate cancer battle into blueprint
results.description: When John Barron had a prostatectomy, he hoped the removal of his prostate – a walnut-sized gland located below the bladder – would provide the respite he needed. The procedure aimed to remove the cancer completely, allowing him to restart life as normal.

results.title: Lake Shore junior fire camp trains 25 young first responders in Maryland
results.description: Lake Shore junior fire camp trains 25 young participants in CPR, firefighting, first aid and 911 operations while recruiting future volunteers.

results.title: Myanmar Junta Forces Displaced Karenni Civilians to Return to Unsafe Conflict Zones
results.description: The military junta is actively pressuring thousands of internally displaced persons (IDPs) from Karenni (Kayah) State who are currently sheltering in southern Shan State to return home, threatening to permanently confiscate their land and property if they refuse, local sources report.

results.title: UK government asks FIFA to investigate Argentina over Falklands banner celebration at World Cup
results.description: UK government has asked FIFA to luanch an investigation after Argentina players raised Falkland Islands banner during their celebration following their 2-1 win against England in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal.

results.title: UAE President appoints Major General Dr Jasim Al Marzooqi as Director-General of Federal Authority for Ambulance and Civil Defence
results.description: Abu Dhabi: UAE President His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan has issued a Federal Decree appointing Major General Dr Jasim Mohammed Hassan Al Marzooqi as Director-General of the Federal Authority for Ambulance and Civil Defence, with the rank of Ministry Undersecretary. Under the decree, Dr Al Marzooqi is transferred from the Ministry of Interior to assume his new role. Dr Al Marzooqi has served as Commander-in-Chief of Civil Defence at the Ministry of Interior since 2015. Prior to that, he was Deputy Director-General of Human Resources at Abu Dhabi Police General Headquarters between 2006 and 2015, and held several leadership positions in human resources, training and forensic laboratories. Throughout his career, he has received several honours and awards, including the Knight's Medal from the International Civil Defence Organisation in Geneva, the Distinguished Leadership Award from the International Fire Protection Association, and the Security Cooperation Medal. Dr Al Marzooqi holds a PhD in Human Resources Science from the University of the West of England in Bristol, United Kingdom, and a Master's degree in Analytical Chemistry from the American University in Washington, DC. He has also overseen the launch of a number of national initiatives related to early warning systems, fire prevention, and the establishment of specialised academies, laboratories and training programmes.

results.title: Waterloo region and area set to experience 2nd day of bad air quality due to wildfire smoke
results.description: Waterloo region, Guelph and area remain under an orange-level weather warning for air quality. Wildfire smoke from fires in northwestern Ontario is hanging over much of southern Ontario creating a hazy, sometimes yellow hue, look to the sky.

results.title: Gajapati Maharaja Reaches Nandighosha Chariot to Perform Chera Pahanra
results.description: #ପ ାଲିଙ୍କିରେ_ଯାଉଥିଲେ_ଗଜପତି_ହଠାତ୍‌..... ଦେବୀ ସୁଭଦ୍ରା ଓ ପ୍ରଭୁ ବଳଭଦ୍ରଙ୍କ ରଥରେ ଛେରା ପହଁରା ପରେ ଏବେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁ କାଳିଆ ଠାକୁରଙ୍କ ନନ୍ଦିଘୋଷ ରଥରେ ଛେରା ପହଁରା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବ। ସେଥିପାଇଁ ନନ୍ଦିଘୋଷ ରଥରେ ବିରାଜମାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଗଜପତି ମହାରାଜ। After completing the sacred Chera Pahanra ritual on the chariots of Goddess Subhadra and Lord Balabhadra, the Gajapati Maharaja has now proceeded to Lord Jagannath's Nandighosha chariot during the world-famous Rath Yatra in Puri. results.title: Former N.J. city official says he was forced out after uncovering ‘red flags’ about his new boss
